plugins.name: claude-md-management
plugins.description: Tools to maintain and improve CLAUDE.md files - audit quality, capture session learnings, and keep project memory current.

plugins.name: codex
plugins.description: Use Codex from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks.

plugins.name: feature-dev
plugins.description: Comprehensive feature development workflow with specialized agents for codebase exploration, architecture design, and quality review

plugins.name: foreman
plugins.description: Prompt-engineering and project-roadmap plugin that crafts Anthropic-grade prompts and picks, surveys, and tracks your next tasks.

plugins.name: foreman
plugins.description: Prompt-engineering and project-roadmap plugin that crafts Anthropic-grade prompts and picks, surveys, and tracks your next tasks.

plugins.name: hush
plugins.description: Token-lean sessions at the harness level, measured on real multi-turn coding sessions — a terse output style, output-shrinking hooks, and log compression cut output tokens and narration.

plugins.name: hush
plugins.description: Token-lean sessions at the harness level, measured on real multi-turn coding sessions — a terse output style, output-shrinking hooks, and log compression cut output tokens and narration.

plugins.name: nelson
plugins.description: Royal Navy agent coordination framework — sailing orders, battle plans, action stations, and a captain's log

plugins.name: plugin-dev
plugins.description: Plugin development toolkit with skills for creating agents, commands, hooks, MCP integrations, and comprehensive plugin structure guidance

plugins.name: ponytail
plugins.description: Lazy senior dev mode. Forces the simplest, shortest solution that actually works: YAGNI, stdlib first, no unrequested abstractions.

plugins.name: razor
plugins.description: YAGNI enforcement at the harness level for real engineering work — nudges toward the simplest solution and gates against unnecessary dependencies, file sprawl, and unchecked build growth.

plugins.name: razor
plugins.description: YAGNI enforcement at the harness level for real engineering work — nudges toward the simplest solution and gates against unnecessary dependencies, file sprawl, and unchecked build growth.

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Create new skills, improve existing skills, and measure skill performance. Use when users want to create a skill from scratch, update or optimize an existing skill, run evals to test a skill, or benchmark skill performance with variance analysis.

plugins.name: skogai-routing
plugins.description: Author and validate SKOGAI.md routing files: YAML frontmatter plus XML tags (starting with <routes>), loaded into CLAUDE.md via native @-linking.

plugins.name: skoghooks
plugins.description: Lifecycle hooks for logging, context loading, and validation across Claude Code sessions

plugins.name: worktrunk
plugins.description: Worktrunk is a CLI for Git worktree management, designed for parallel AI agent workflows. This plugin provides configuration guidance (LLM commit messages, project hooks, worktree paths) and automatic activity tracking (🤖/💬 indicators in `wt list` showing active Claude sessions).
